label: linear algebra
evidence: Mathlib/LinearAlgebra (11652 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for vector spaces, bases, matrices-as-maps, tensor/exterior algebra — the standard formal home of the field.
verify_note: hierarchy path ok (11652 decls); Basis/BilinearForm/ExteriorAlgebra confirm scope; QID=linear algebra

label: combinatorics
evidence: Mathlib/Combinatorics (7004 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder covering graphs, set families, extremal/enumerative combinatorics, matroids etc.
verify_note: hierarchy path ok (7004); Graph/Extremal/Enumerative/Matroid confirm scope; QID=combinatorics

label: integral calculus
evidence: Mathlib/MeasureTheory/Integral (2053 decls) formalizes Lebesgue/Bochner integration and the fundamental theorem of calculus lemmas, the natural home of integral calculus.
verify_note: path ok (2053); IntervalIntegral/FundThmCalculus.lean + Bochner confirm integration home; QID=integral calculus

label: metric geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Topology/MetricSpace (2580 decls): metric geometry (Gromov-Hausdorff, geodesics) is a subset of this folder, no dedicated subfolder exists yet.
verify_note: path ok (2580); GromovHausdorff.lean+Isometry.lean present; no tighter folder exists; QID=metric geometry

label: modular arithmetic
evidence: Mathlib/Data/ZMod (334 decls) is Mathlib's formalization of arithmetic modulo n (ZMod type, congruences), the standard home of modular arithmetic.
verify_note: path ok (334); ZMod Basic/Coprime/QuotientRing = arithmetic mod n; QID=modular arithmetic

label: Lie theory
evidence: Mathlib/Algebra/Lie (2012 decls) is the dedicated folder for Lie algebras, Lie modules, root systems, and related structures central to Lie theory.
verify_note: path ok (2012); Cartan*/Weights confirm Lie home; NB root systems live in LinearAlgebra/RootSystem, not here

label: probability theory
evidence: Mathlib/Probability (3900 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for measures, independence, martingales, distributions, CLT etc.
verify_note: path ok (3900); Martingale/CentralLimitTheorem/Distributions confirm scope; QID=probability theory

label: ring theory
evidence: Mathlib/RingTheory (17722 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for ideals, localization, Noetherian/Artinian rings, valuation theory etc — the field's formal home.
verify_note: path ok (17722); Artinian/ClassGroup/AdicCompletion confirm scope; QID=ring theory

label: differential geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) covers smooth manifolds, tangent bundles, Riemannian metrics, vector fields — the standard formal home of differential geometry.
verify_note: path ok (3151); ContMDiff/Diffeomorph/Riemannian/ confirm scope; QID=differential geometry

label: functional analysis
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Normed (5600 decls) covers normed/Banach spaces and bounded operators, the core of functional analysis.
verify_note: path ok (5600); Operator/Banach.lean+BanachSteinhaus = FA core; no FunctionalAnalysis folder; best home

label: functional analysis
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/InnerProductSpace (1836 decls) formalizes Hilbert-space theory, a core pillar of functional analysis alongside Banach-space theory.
verify_note: broad field pinned to narrow subfolder: folder is Hilbert-space theory (Q190007/Q214159); FA already on Normed

label: complex analysis
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Complex (1666 decls) is the dedicated folder for holomorphic functions, Cauchy integral theory, and complex-analytic structure.
verify_note: path ok (1666); CauchyIntegral/AbsMax/Arg confirm scope; QID=complex analysis
